name: Buttered Green Beans and Carrots
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces carrots, peeled and cut into matchstick-size strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 6 minutes.
2. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the green beans to a bowl of ice water.
3. Cook the carrots in the same boiling water until crisp-tender, about 1 minute.
4. Transfer the carrots to the ice water with the beans.
5. Drain; pat the vegetables dry.
- The vegetables can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Wrap them in paper towels and refrigerate.
6. Melt the butter and olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
7. Add the vegetables and toss until hot, about 2 minutes.
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
